Jamie was a former employee of Iliad Media Group. When the company transitioned to 100% employee-owned, Jamie was surprised and delighted. If Iliad Media Group had 200 employees, and each employee received an equal share of ownership, how many percent of the company did each employee own?

The instruction is copied verbatim, and the response starts and ends with the word "how". Words with all capital letters should appear at least 39 times.
